title: Hero: Timber Beach House on Cliffs
prompt: Ultra-photorealistic hero exterior of a modern timber-clad beach house perched on low coastal cliffs overlooking the ocean. Camera: Sony a7R IV, 35mm lens. Settings: f/8, ISO 100, 1/200s. Camera height 1.6 m, slight downward angle to include cliff edge and ocean horizon. Time: late morning, soft sun from right-front (south-east) casting long gentle shadows. Composition: wide horizontal frame; foreground windswept grasses and native dune shrubs, midground timber house and stone plinth, background open sea and sailboats on horizon; framed with negative space sky for branding-safe crop. Materials & textures: warm vertical cedar cladding, dark bronze window frames, local limestone base, matte glass balcony balustrade, weathered timber deck with integrated stainless steel railing. Environmental details: sea spray haze, gentle surf, coastal birds in the distance, subtle wake in water. Mood & palette: airy, warm neutrals—sand, driftwood, soft blue—luxury realism at photographic quality. Use architectural lighting accents and soft ambient fill. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Hero exterior of a timber-clad modern beach house on coastal cliffs with ocean backdrop
description: Hero exterior: modern timber beach house on cliffs with warm cedar cladding, ocean horizon, and landscaped dune foreground.

title: Arrival: Timber Entry and Drive Approach
prompt: Cinematic arrival view down a coastal drive toward a cedar-facade beach house. Camera: Canon EOS R5, 50mm lens. Settings: f/5.6, ISO 100, 1/160s. Camera height 1.2 m, eye-level slightly low to accentuate approach and porch overhang. Time: golden hour late afternoon, warm backlight from left-rear (west) creating rim light on timber texture. Composition: vertical framing; foreground curved stone driveway and low coastal planting, midground parked electric vehicle and two people walking for scale (couple with casual coastal attire, blurred to emphasize architecture), background entry porch with sculptural pivot door and slatted timber screen. Materials & textures: thermally-treated cedar, recycled-oak boarding, textured concrete pavers, matte black metal canopy, soft exterior sconces. Environmental details: blown grasses, subtle footprints in sand nearby, motion blur of a gull overhead. Styling: minimalist planters, bench, concealed mailbox. Mood & palette: warm amber highlights, grey-blue shadows, premium real-estate appeal, highly realistic photography. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Portrait arrival view to cedar beach house with driveway, timber entry and golden-hour lighting
description: Arrival shot: vertical approach down a curved driveway to a cedar-framed entry, warm golden-hour light, human scale for marketing.

title: Context: Elevated Coastal Site Study
prompt: Elevated contextual view of a beachfront villa within its coastal neighborhood and dunes. Camera: DJI Mavic 3 Pro (aerial), 24mm equivalent. Settings: f/4, ISO 100, 1/400s. Camera angle: 35° downward oblique from 30 m altitude to show site integration. Time: mid-morning with sun from the left (east), soft shadowing for depth. Composition: wide panoramic cinema frame; foreground dune ridges and boardwalk, midground timber villa with layered terraces and lap pool, background uninterrupted ocean and distant headland, framed left by native scrub to convey privacy. Materials & textures: mixed vertical and horizontal timber facades, light-reflective pool, sand pathways, planted green roofs on lower wings. Environmental details: morning mist hugging the water, small fishing boat, textured sand patterns. Mood & palette: contemplative coastal neutrals—muted ochre, warm cedar, sea-glass blues; documentary realism for planning and marketing. Include scale annotations conceptually (do not show text). No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Aerial oblique view of a timber beachfront villa integrated with dunes and ocean context
description: Context aerial: oblique view showing villa siting, dunes, pool and ocean, useful for site planning and coastal marketing.

title: Dusk: Warm Twilight on Deck and Sea
prompt: Moody twilight exterior of a modern beach house terrace glowing against a cooling ocean. Camera: Nikon Z7 II, 24-70mm at 35mm. Settings: f/4, ISO 200, 1/60s (tripod). Camera height 1.4 m, slightly elevated to capture terrace planes and horizon. Time: blue hour just after sunset, main light source: warm interior and integrated deck lighting from house (left), residual cool ambient sky from right. Composition: cinematic horizontal framing; foreground timber deck with lounge groups, midground sliding glass pocket open to living room, background dark sea and horizon with faint lights. Materials & textures: oiled blackbutt timber deck, sheer linen curtains, terrazzo-topped side tables, matte steel outdoor fireplace, low-profile sectional with layered coastal throws. Environmental details: lanterns, subtle candle glow, damp sand sheen, long-exposure sea blur. Mood & palette: contrast warm amber interiors vs deep cobalt sky, luxurious inviting realism suitable for dusk marketing. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Twilight terrace of beach house with warm interior glow, outdoor fireplace and ocean backdrop
description: Dusk scene: glowing terrace and indoor-outdoor living at blue hour, warm interior lights contrasting the cobalt sea.

title: Breezy Indoor-Outdoor Living Room
prompt: Styled semi-interior living room opening to the ocean with layered coastal textiles and sculptural decor. Camera: Fujifilm GFX 100 II, 45mm lens. Settings: f/5.6, ISO 160, 1/125s. Camera height 1.1 m, eye-level framing to emphasize flow between inside and outside. Time: late morning with diffuse sunlight from the right-front (south-east) through sheer curtains. Composition: vertical composition; foreground woven jute rug and organic coffee table with sculptural ceramic vase, midground modular linen sofa arranged to face sea, background full-height sliding doors open to deck and water. Furniture & styling: low oak coffee table, rounded boucle occasional chair, layered throws in indigo and sand, oversized abstract coastal painting on wall, pendant rattan light, sisal rugs, stacked coffee-table books, ceramic bowls, potted eucalyptus. Materials & textures: whitewashed oak, lime-washed plaster, natural fibre textiles, matte brass fixtures. Mood & palette: soft coastal minimalism—sand, indigo, driftwood—photorealistic, sale-oriented staging with one occupant (reading) for scale. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Indoor-outdoor living room with linen sofa, coastal textiles, open sliding doors to ocean view
description: Breezy living: semi-interior indoor-outdoor living room with layered textiles, sculptural decor and ocean view, staged for sales.

title: Vignette: Sculptural Coastal Styling
prompt: Intimate square vignette of luxe coastal styling: tabletop still life on an oak sideboard that reads as a material and styling precedent. Camera: Leica SL2, 50mm Summilux. Settings: f/2.8, ISO 200, 1/125s. Camera height 0.9 m, slightly angled 10° down to emphasize tabletop plane. Time: soft morning light from left, diffused by sheer curtain. Composition: square crop; foreground ceramic vessel and woven tray, midground sculptural lamp and framed small abstract seascape on lean, background textured limewash wall and shadow. Materials & textures: matte white ceramics, hand-thrown terracotta, woven rattan tray, raw oak board, linen runner, patinated brass lamp. Styling objects: curated books, folded striped coastal napkin, small driftwood object, single stem in glass bottle. Mood & palette: tactile neutrals with warm sand and muted aqua accents, hyper-real photographic quality for interior moodboards and product references. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Square vignette of sculptural coastal styling with ceramics, linen, driftwood and framed art
description: Styling vignette: curated tabletop with ceramics, linen and sculptural lamp—luxury coastal materials and textures for interiors.

title: Mood: Storm-Edge Coastal Weather Study
prompt: Atmospheric weather study showing the beach house under a dramatic storm-edge sky—useful for resilience and mood exploration. Camera: Sony Alpha a1, 24mm lens. Settings: f/11, ISO 100, 1/250s. Camera height 1.6 m, level horizon with slight wide perspective to emphasize sky. Time: late afternoon during an approaching squall, light direction strong from left-front with high contrast shafts through cloud breaks. Composition: wide cinema frame; foreground churned sand and wet boardwalk, midground house with shuttered windows and closed screens, background heavy dark clouds and textured ocean swells. Materials & textures: saturated wet timber, rain-beaded glass, rough concrete base, windswept dune grasses flattened by wind. Environmental details: dramatic cloud bank, whitecaps, streaks of rain at sea, moody spray. Mood & palette: cool slate blues, charcoal, warm timber highlights—cinematic, highly realistic atmospheric rendering for marketing risk and emotion. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Cinematic storm-edge study of a timber beach house with dramatic clouds and wet dunes
description: Weather study: cinematic storm-edge scene showing timber house resilience and dramatic coastal mood for planning and marketing.

title: Terrace & Amenities: Pool Deck Lounge
prompt: Square composition of a luxury terrace and amenities: infinity lap pool, sun lounges and sheltered outdoor dining overlooking the ocean. Camera: Canon EOS R3, 24mm lens. Settings: f/6.3, ISO 100, 1/200s. Camera height 1.3 m, slight downward tilt to include pool edge and horizon line. Time: early afternoon with sun from rear-left, balanced soft shadows and specular highlights on water. Composition: square frame; foreground textured stone pool coping and towels, midground infinity pool leading to timber sun-loungers and pergola-shaded dining area, background uninterrupted sea and distant reef line. Materials & textures: honed limestone paving, oiled cedar pergola, teak loungers with white cushions, woven parasols, frameless glass pool edge. Styling: folded towels, tray with non-alcoholic citrus mocktails, low fire bowl, potted succulents. Mood & palette: Mediterranean-leaning warm neutrals and sea-glass blues, highly realistic resort-quality photography ideal for listing imagery. No text, no watermark, no logo.
altText: Square terrace image of infinity pool, teak loungers, pergola dining and ocean horizon
description: Terrace amenities: square pool-deck composition with pergola dining, loungers and ocean view—commercially staged for coastal listings.
